originalTitle: Reinforcement Learning dev with Joseph Suarez
title: Refining Python Backend to Debug Neural MMO 3 Performance for Puffer 4 Release
summary: Worked on cleaning up the Python backend to enable testing of Neural MMO 3 training performance. The main goal was to isolate whether the training regression is an environment-specific bug or a learning bug, with the aim of unblocking the Puffer 4 release.
